title: Caught in an Avalanche
immediate_steps: Try to ski or board straight downhill to gather speed, then veer left or right to escape the avalanche path
If swept up, discard skis and poles (they act as anchors)
Make swimming motions to fight your way to the surface
As the snow slows down, cup your hands over your mouth to create an air pocket
Take a deep breath to expand your chest just before the snow sets (it sets like concrete)
avoid: Do not yell once buried (it wastes oxygen; only yell when you hear rescuers directly above you)
